CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00
Off Calendar Jun-18-2018 Set For Trial On Jun-18-18 At 11:05 A.M. In Dept 502

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-19-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appreances:
Plaintiff: Boris Ipatov, with the assistance of Court Certified Russian Interpreter Tatiana Iacona, No. 301252
Defendant: YMCA of San Francisco dba Embarcadero YMCA, represented by Jeff Briz, membership manager and Jackie O'Brien, risk managment. All parties are sworn

With the assistance of Russian Interpreter, Tatiana Iacona,
Boris Ipatov testifies on his own behalf.
The following exhibits are marked and identified
No 1) Letter from Psychiatrist ; No. 2) copy of incident report-Loss of $4300.

Jeff Briz and Jackie O'Brien, testify on behalf of the defendant.
The following exhibits are marked and identified
A) (2 photos of lockers) ; B) ( Waiver/contract of use of YMCA); C) Group of four color photos; D) handdrawn floorplan of lockerroom

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes the matter under submission

The Court will return all exhibits upon ruling
